feature: Fix grocery-list badge color, add daily view header, fix settings profile editor button

prompts.description: Fix hardcoded badge color in grocery-list.tsx weekly view header
prompts.prompt:
In components/grocery-list.tsx, on line 104, change: `
Weekly shopping list
` to: `
Weekly shopping list
` Do not change anything else.

prompts.description: Add selectedDay optional prop to GroceryList for a properly-styled daily view header
Fix 'Open profile editor' button in settings-screen.tsx to navigate to onboarding (step 0)
prompts.prompt:
In components/settings-screen.tsx, find the 'Detailed profile editor' settings-section-panel block (around line 307). Make exactly these changes:

1. Change the button onClick from `() => setCurrentStep(2)` to `() => setCurrentStep(0)`.

2. Update the description paragraph from:
   `For weight, body fat, muscle mass, and profile name, use the detailed editor from your dashboard.`
   to:
   `Re-enter your body stats to recalculate your calorie and macro targets. This will take you back to update your profile.`

3. Change the button label from `Open profile editor` to `Update my profile`.

Do not change anything else.
